name: Pleasley

locations.address:
Bolsover District Council,
Sherwood Lodge,
Bolsover,
Chestefield

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers the villages of Pleasley, Glapwell and New Houghton. It belongs to the North East Local Policing Unit.

The area has a mining history, which ended in the 1980s, and is situated in between Chesterfield and Mansfield with close proximity to the M1 motorway.
